title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India Holdings Services:
Wavin India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India Holdings Services!
